title: ctenitis paucisora
intro: Ctenitis paucisora, also known as Paucisora fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ctenitis paucisora include treating fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Ctenitis paucisora fern are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
